name: NextClaw App Runtime
summary: Create, inspect, run, and share NextClaw micro apps through the local napp CLI with guided install, readiness checks, and explicit permission mapping.

summaryI18n.en: Create, inspect, run, and share NextClaw micro apps through the local napp CLI with guided install, readiness checks, and explicit permission mapping.
summaryI18n.zh: 通过本地 napp CLI 创建、检查、运行和分享 NextClaw 微应用，覆盖安装引导、就绪检查与显式权限映射。

description: Use this skill when the user wants to build or use a local NextClaw micro app through the standalone @nextclaw/app-runtime package. The skill covers npm installation, napp readiness checks, `napp create` starter scaffolding, inspect-before-run workflow, explicit document permission mapping, and first-run troubleshooting.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when the user wants to build or use a local NextClaw micro app through the standalone @nextclaw/app-runtime package. The skill covers npm installation, napp readiness checks, `napp create` starter scaffolding, inspect-before-run workflow, explicit document permission mapping, and first-run troubleshooting.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当用户希望通过独立的 @nextclaw/app-runtime 包来构建或使用本地 NextClaw 微应用时使用此技能。它覆盖 npm 安装、napp 就绪检查、`napp create` 起步脚手架、先 inspect 后 run 的工作流、显式文档权限映射以及首轮运行排障。

author: NextClaw
